disclaimer: Inquiry numbers were found cited in DEG, SCRS, and industry publications. To verify any inquiry, search the number at degweb.org/deg-database/
howToVerify: Go to degweb.org/deg-database and enter the inquiry number to see the full official response

inquiries.title: In-Process Repair Scan
inquiries.response: CCC defines In-Process Scan as: Any scan completed after pre-repair scan and before post-repair scan. NOT INCLUDED in all three IPs.
keyPoints: In-process scan NOT INCLUDED in all three IPs
CCC is only IP offering this as a database selection
May be needed when reenergizing hybrid/EV mid-repair

inquiries.title: Rivet Drilling / Debris Removal
inquiries.response: Any additional labor to remove components/trims to gain access to remove rivet debris from cavities is NOT INCLUDED.
keyPoints: Rivet debris removal NOT INCLUDED in all three IPs
Additional labor to access debris NOT INCLUDED
Applies when rivets fall into enclosed cavities

inquiries.title: Roof Replacement Labor Times
inquiries.response: After review following I-CAR and Honda training video, CCC increased labor and refinish times; Mitchell updated allowances.
keyPoints: Labor times increased after inquiry review
Refinish times were updated
I-CAR and OEM training revealed discrepancies
inquiries.citedIn: Repairer Driven News - DEG top inquiries 2021

inquiries.title: Quarter Panel and Wheelhouse Labor
inquiries.response: Audatex original 40.5 hours was inadequate. Labor increased to 70.1 hours total.
keyPoints: Labor increased from 40.5 to 70.1 hours
Complex vehicles may have inadequate database times
Submit inquiry when times seem unrealistic
inquiries.citedIn: Repairer Driven News - DEG top inquiries 2021

inquiries.title: Inner Rear Body Panel and Floor Work
inquiries.response: MOTOR significantly increased labor allowances across multiple operations after review.
keyPoints: Labor allowances significantly increased
Cargo van repairs have unique requirements
Multiple operations were updated
inquiries.citedIn: Repairer Driven News - DEG top inquiries 2021

inquiries.title: Quarter Panel Replacement Operations
inquiries.response: CCC implemented 11 updates after reviewing the inquiry, with most changes increasing labor times.
keyPoints: 11 database updates implemented
Most changes increased labor times
Multiple operations affected by single inquiry
inquiries.citedIn: Repairer Driven News - DEG top inquiries 2021

inquiries.title: Additional Seam Sealer on Welded Panels
inquiries.response: MOTOR: Estimated work time includes replacing seam sealer removed due to part removal. Additional seam sealer beyond attachment points requires on-the-spot evaluation.
keyPoints: Seam sealer at removal point INCLUDED
Additional seam sealer beyond attachment points NOT INCLUDED
On-the-spot evaluation required

inquiries.title: Masking for Seam Sealer Application
inquiries.response: Masking off panels to apply sprayable seam sealer is NOT INCLUDED. On-the-spot evaluation recommended.
keyPoints: Masking for seam sealer NOT INCLUDED
Application time varies by product and method
Material costs NOT INCLUDED

inquiries.title: Rear Door Replacement Labor
inquiries.response: Solera increased labor from 6.9 to 7.4 hours; replacement time changed from 3.0 to 3.5 hours. O/H and panel replacement have overlap issues.
keyPoints: Labor increased from 6.9 to 7.4 hours
Replacement time increased from 3.0 to 3.5 hours
O/H and panel replacement have overlap deductions

inquiries.title: Frame Replacement Labor Classification
inquiries.response: Mitchell: Frame R&R is a unique operation where one labor time represents multiple individual operations. Blends mechanical and body work percentages that vary by vehicle.
keyPoints: Frame R&R combines multiple individual operations
Blends mechanical and body work percentages
P-pages allow shop-specific adjustments

inquiries.title: Bumper Masking in Radar Zone
inquiries.response: Published refinish times on bumpers may not include masking the backside of bumper in the radar zone.
keyPoints: Backside bumper masking in radar zone may NOT be INCLUDED
ADAS-equipped vehicles have additional masking needs
Verify masking requirements for radar areas

inquiries.title: Cooling System Fill and Bleed
inquiries.response: MOTOR Guide To Estimating RADIATOR section addresses NOT INCLUDED operations when filling and bleeding cooling systems.
keyPoints: Filling cooling system has specific NOT INCLUDED items
Bleeding cooling system has specific NOT INCLUDED items
Reference MOTOR GTE RADIATOR section

inquiries.title: OEM Required Safety Inspections
inquiries.response: MOTOR: Vehicle Safety Inspections are not listed in the MOTOR Guide To Estimating and is not an included operation.
keyPoints: Safety inspections NOT INCLUDED
Not listed in MOTOR Guide to Estimating
OEM-required inspections need separate time

inquiries.title: Battery Disconnect and Reconnect
inquiries.response: Per MOTORS Guide to Estimating, D&R of the battery is a not included item. If labor footnotes indicate labor is INCLUDED, that would be for one disconnect only. Multiple disconnects may be required for welding, dent pulling, refinishing, or moving the vehicle between departments.
keyPoints: Battery D&R is NOT INCLUDED per MOTOR GTE
If footnote says INCLUDED it means one disconnect only
Multiple disconnects for welding, pulling, refinishing require on-the-spot evaluation
OEM procedures may require disconnect at each repair stage

inquiries.title: Matte / Satin Clear Coat Application
inquiries.response: Operations outside of normal gloss clear coat steps are NOT INCLUDED. The matte clear application process may vary from standard clear coat procedures, requiring different equipment setup, spray techniques, and material.
keyPoints: Matte/satin clear NOT INCLUDED in standard refinish times
Application process differs from standard gloss clear
Additional material cost NOT INCLUDED
May require special spray equipment and technique

inquiries.title: ADAS Calibration Setup and Floor Leveling
inquiries.response: Checking the level of the floor would not be included when a dedicated area is used to perform calibration. Estimated time does not include any troubleshooting. Setup of targets, fixtures, and equipment is a separate consideration.
keyPoints: Floor leveling check NOT INCLUDED (if dedicated area)
Troubleshooting NOT INCLUDED in calibration time
Target and fixture setup may require additional time
Tire pressure verification before calibration NOT INCLUDED

inquiries.title: Color Matching and Spray Out Cards
inquiries.response: Neither CCC nor Mitchell have assigned labor values for color matching/spray out card operations. Any labor or materials required to perform color match and spray out cards, including clear coat and spray equipment setup, would be NOT INCLUDED.
keyPoints: Color matching labor NOT INCLUDED in all three IPs
Spray out card preparation NOT INCLUDED
Clear coat on spray out cards NOT INCLUDED
Equipment setup for color match NOT INCLUDED
Material costs for spray out cards NOT INCLUDED

inquiries.title: Additional Install / Test Fit of Panel
inquiries.response: CCC GTE states reported times include ONE test fit of a component and normal adjustment procedures within the range of motion permitted by fasteners. Additional install/fit of panel is NOT INCLUDED. Trial fitting a new panel, removing it for refinish, then reinstalling requires additional time.
keyPoints: ONE test fit INCLUDED in replacement time
Additional test fits NOT INCLUDED
Remove for refinish, reinstall = additional labor
Complex panel fitting may require on-the-spot evaluation

inquiries.title: Welder Setup and Preparation
inquiries.response: CCC/MOTORS labor time premise states that welder set-up or preparation is NOT INCLUDED. This includes setting up welding equipment, adjusting settings, preparing the weld area, and performing test welds.
keyPoints: Welder setup NOT INCLUDED per MOTOR GTE
Adjusting weld settings NOT INCLUDED
Test welds on scrap material NOT INCLUDED
Weld-through primer application NOT INCLUDED

inquiries.title: Two-Stage and Three-Stage Refinish
inquiries.response: CCC: Two-stage (basecoat/clearcoat) is the default refinish process. Three-stage (tri-coat, pearl) requires additional time. Mitchell: Three-stage add time is calculated as a percentage of the two-stage refinish time. Additional tint cycles beyond the standard mix may require additional time.
keyPoints: Three-stage paint requires additional refinish time
Mitchell calculates 3-stage as percentage of 2-stage time
Additional tint cycles for color match NOT INCLUDED
Transparent/candy colors may need tinted primer—additional time
CCC: Add for Three Stage is a separate line item

inquiries.title: R&I Glass and Regulator for Door Skin Replacement
inquiries.response: All three estimating systems have different inclusion/exclusion for glass and regulator R&I when replacing a door skin. Always reference vehicle chapter footnotes or Labor Reports to verify if operations are included or excluded for the specific vehicle.
keyPoints: Glass R&I inclusion varies by estimating system
Regulator R&I inclusion varies by vehicle
Always check vehicle-specific footnotes
Door skin replacement overlap with glass R&I must be verified

inquiries.title: Featheredge, Prime, and Block (FPB)
inquiries.response: Feather, Prime, and Block (FPB) is NOT INCLUDED in refinish labor time in any of the three major estimating systems (CCC/MOTOR, Mitchell, or Audatex). Per the Collision Industry Conference (CIC) and all three P-pages: FPB is the not-included refinish-prep operation that bridges the gap between completed body repair (sanded to 150-grit) and the starting point of published refinish time (a new undamaged panel). Only sealer coat is included in standard refinish time — primer-surfacer, featheredging, and blocking are separately compensable.
keyPoints: Feather, Prime, and Block is NOT INCLUDED in refinish labor (CCC/Mitchell/Audatex)
Refinish times assume a NEW UNDAMAGED PANEL as starting point
Body labor ends at 150-grit sanded body filler — FPB bridges to refinish start
Primer-surfacer (high-build/2K primer) application NOT INCLUDED
Blocking/sanding primer flat NOT INCLUDED
Featheredging the edge of the repair area NOT INCLUDED
Masking for primer application NOT INCLUDED (separate from refinish masking)
Primer-surfacer material NOT INCLUDED
On-the-spot evaluation required — time varies by repair size
inquiries.citedIn: MOTOR GTE, Mitchell P-Pages ATG 32, CIC position, SCRS, degweb.org

inquiries.title: De-nib, Wet Sand, and Buff (Finish Sand and Buff)
inquiries.response: The performance of finish sand and buff (de-nib) is NOT INCLUDED in Mitchell refinish labor time. CCC: De-nib is NOT INCLUDED in the refinish time. This includes wet/dry sanding, rub-out, and buffing after clear coat application.
keyPoints: De-nib NOT INCLUDED in refinish time (CCC and Mitchell)
Wet/dry sand NOT INCLUDED
Rub-out and buff NOT INCLUDED
On-the-spot evaluation for time required
Material costs for sandpaper, compound NOT INCLUDED

inquiries.title: Cover Vehicle for Overspray Protection
inquiries.response: Covering the vehicle to protect from overspray during refinishing is NOT INCLUDED in refinish labor times. This includes masking wheels, glass, trim, and other components not being refinished.
keyPoints: Covering car for overspray NOT INCLUDED
Masking wheels, glass, trim NOT INCLUDED in refinish time
Material costs for masking paper/tape NOT INCLUDED
Time varies based on vehicle size and extent of refinish

inquiries.title: Nameplate, Emblem, and Adhesive-Backed Molding Removal
inquiries.response: For nameplates, emblems, and adhesive-backed moldings: labor time is for installation only. Removal of the molding and cleaning adhesive left behind is NOT INCLUDED in R/R time.
keyPoints: Nameplate/emblem R&R time is for INSTALLATION only
Removal labor NOT INCLUDED
Cleaning adhesive residue NOT INCLUDED
Template creation for precise replacement NOT INCLUDED
Adhesive material for reinstallation NOT INCLUDED

inquiries.title: Cooling Fan Operation Test
inquiries.response: Cooling fan operation test is NOT INCLUDED in all three estimating systems. After any repair involving the cooling system, radiator, or condenser, testing fan operation is a separate procedure.
keyPoints: Cooling fan test NOT INCLUDED in all three IPs
Required after radiator/condenser R&I or replacement
Includes verifying fan engages at proper temperature
Electrical connector inspection NOT INCLUDED

inquiries.title: Cavity Wax Injection / Anti-Corrosion Treatment
inquiries.response: Application of cavity wax or anti-corrosion treatment inside enclosed panels, cavities, and box sections is NOT INCLUDED. OEM procedures often require cavity wax injection after structural panel replacement to restore factory corrosion protection.
keyPoints: Cavity wax injection NOT INCLUDED
Required by many OEMs after structural replacement
Material costs NOT INCLUDED
Access hole drilling for injection NOT INCLUDED
Plug installation after injection NOT INCLUDED

inquiries.title: Sound Deadener Pad Replacement
inquiries.response: Removal and replacement of sound deadener pads on panels being replaced is NOT INCLUDED in panel replacement time. OEM sound deadener must be sourced and applied to match factory specifications.
keyPoints: Sound deadener removal NOT INCLUDED in panel R&R
Application of new sound deadener NOT INCLUDED
OEM sound deadener material NOT INCLUDED
Location and type varies by vehicle—verify OEM specs
Aftermarket alternatives may not meet OEM requirements

inquiries.title: Corrosion Protection on Bare Metal
inquiries.response: Application of corrosion protection (epoxy primer, weld-through primer, anti-corrosion coatings) to bare metal areas exposed during repair is NOT INCLUDED. OEM procedures specify corrosion protection requirements for all bare metal surfaces.
keyPoints: Epoxy primer on bare metal NOT INCLUDED
Weld-through primer NOT INCLUDED
Anti-corrosion coating NOT INCLUDED
Material costs NOT INCLUDED
OEM procedures dictate specific products and application methods

inquiries.title: Electronic Module Programming and Coding
inquiries.response: Programming, coding, or initializing new electronic modules after replacement is NOT INCLUDED in R&R labor times. Many replacement modules require dealer-level programming or online subscription services to activate.
keyPoints: Module programming/coding NOT INCLUDED in R&R time
May require dealer-level scan tool or online access
Subscription fees for programming services NOT INCLUDED
Applies to BCM, PCM, airbag modules, TPMS, etc.
Some modules require VIN-specific programming

inquiries.title: Headlamp Aiming After Replacement or R&I
inquiries.response: Headlamp aiming is typically NOT INCLUDED in headlamp R&I or replacement labor times. Vehicles with adaptive or LED/HID headlamps may require specialized aiming equipment and procedures.
keyPoints: Headlamp aiming NOT INCLUDED in R&I or replacement time
Adaptive headlamp aiming may require scan tool
LED/HID headlamps may require specialized aiming equipment
State inspection may require proper headlamp aim verification
Both horizontal and vertical aim must be checked

inquiries.title: Structural Measuring and Verification
inquiries.response: Measuring for structural damage verification or documenting pre/post-repair dimensions is NOT INCLUDED in repair or replacement labor times. I-CAR recommends three-dimensional measuring during and after structural repairs.
keyPoints: Pre-repair measuring NOT INCLUDED
In-process measuring NOT INCLUDED
Post-repair verification measuring NOT INCLUDED
Setup of measuring equipment NOT INCLUDED
Documentation of measurements NOT INCLUDED

inquiries.title: Blend Refinish Time Calculation
inquiries.response: CCC: Blend time is calculated using the blend formula applied to the full panel refinish time. Mitchell: Blend time uses CEG blend percentage. The blend formula should be applied to the FULL panel refinish time, not a reduced time. Adjacent panel blend is NOT INCLUDED in the refinished panel's time.
keyPoints: Blend calculated from FULL panel refinish time
CCC and Mitchell use different blend formulas
Adjacent panel blend is separate from refinished panel
Three-stage blend requires additional time beyond two-stage
Edge-to-edge blend may require more time than standard blend

inquiries.title: Pinchweld Repair and Restoration for Glass
inquiries.response: Pinchweld repair, cleaning, priming, and preparation for glass installation is NOT INCLUDED in glass R&I or replacement times. Damaged pinchwelds must be restored to proper profile before glass installation.
keyPoints: Pinchweld repair/restoration NOT INCLUDED in glass time
Cleaning old urethane from pinchweld NOT INCLUDED
Priming pinchweld NOT INCLUDED
Rust treatment on pinchweld NOT INCLUDED
Proper pinchweld profile required for glass adhesion

inquiries.title: Glass Urethane Cure Time and Safe Drive-Away
inquiries.response: Monitoring urethane cure time and safe drive-away time is NOT INCLUDED in glass replacement labor. The vehicle must remain stationary until the adhesive reaches minimum drive-away strength per the adhesive manufacturer's specifications.
keyPoints: Monitoring cure time NOT INCLUDED
Safe drive-away time varies by adhesive product and temperature
Vehicle must not be moved during cure period
Cold weather extends cure time significantly
Adhesive manufacturer specs must be followed

inquiries.title: Window Tint Removal and Replacement
inquiries.response: Removal of aftermarket window tint during glass R&I or replacement is NOT INCLUDED. Replacement of window tint after glass work is NOT INCLUDED. Factory privacy glass tint is part of the glass and does not require separate tint work.
keyPoints: Aftermarket tint removal NOT INCLUDED
Tint replacement after glass work NOT INCLUDED
Tint material costs NOT INCLUDED
Factory privacy glass does not need separate tint
May require sublet to tint specialist

inquiries.title: OEM Procedure Research and Access
inquiries.response: Mitchell CEG Additions to Labor update: Research, retrieval, review, or usage cost of OEM and/or other service procedural information is NOT INCLUDED. Time to access and review OEM repair procedures is a legitimate additional operation.
keyPoints: OEM procedure research time NOT INCLUDED
Subscription costs for OEM portals NOT INCLUDED
Time to review procedures NOT INCLUDED
Printing/documenting procedures NOT INCLUDED
Mitchell CEG explicitly lists this as an Addition to Labor
inquiries.citedIn: Mitchell CEG Additions to Labor, degweb.org

inquiries.title: Weld Testing and Destructive Testing
inquiries.response: Mitchell CEG update: Time to perform weld testing or matching including the performance of destructive weld testing is NOT INCLUDED. Destructive weld tests on practice coupons verify proper weld penetration and strength before welding on the vehicle.
keyPoints: Weld testing NOT INCLUDED per Mitchell CEG
Destructive weld test on coupons NOT INCLUDED
Practice welds for setup NOT INCLUDED
I-CAR recommends destructive testing before structural welding
Documentation of weld quality NOT INCLUDED
inquiries.citedIn: Mitchell CEG Additions to Labor, I-CAR

inquiries.title: Refinish Fixture or Stand Setup
inquiries.response: MOTOR has added that assembling or setting up a unique fixture or stand to hold parts for refinishing is a not-included operation. This includes building or configuring paint stands for bumpers, fenders, doors, or other removable panels.
keyPoints: Paint stand/fixture setup NOT INCLUDED
Building custom fixtures for odd-shaped parts NOT INCLUDED
Hanging parts for refinish NOT INCLUDED
Applies to bumper covers, fenders, doors on stands

inquiries.title: Seatbelt System Inspection
inquiries.response: Visual and functional inspection of seatbelt systems after a collision is NOT INCLUDED. OEM procedures typically require inspection of all seatbelts, retractors, anchors, and pretensioners on vehicles involved in a collision where airbags deployed.
keyPoints: Seatbelt inspection NOT INCLUDED
Required by most OEMs after airbag deployment
Includes retractor function, webbing, anchors
Pretensioner inspection/replacement per OEM procedures
Documentation of inspection findings NOT INCLUDED

inquiries.title: Stage and Secure Parts for Refinish
inquiries.response: Staging and securing removed parts in the refinish area, including organizing components for proper sequence of refinishing, is NOT INCLUDED in refinish labor times.
keyPoints: Staging parts for refinish NOT INCLUDED
Organizing components for paint sequence NOT INCLUDED
Moving parts between departments NOT INCLUDED
Protecting parts during transport NOT INCLUDED

inquiries.title: Add for Edging (Panel Edges and Jambs)
inquiries.response: Refinishing panel edges and door jambs beyond what is included in the standard refinish time is NOT INCLUDED. Standard refinish time covers the exterior face of the panel only. Edging involves masking, spraying, and clearing the edges and return areas of panels.
keyPoints: Edging labor NOT INCLUDED in standard refinish time
Applies to door jambs, hood edges, trunk edges
Additional masking for edging NOT INCLUDED
Each edged area requires additional basecoat and clearcoat

inquiries.title: Adhesive Bonded Panel Procedures
inquiries.response: For adhesive bonded panels (vs. welded), additional procedures including adhesive removal, surface preparation, adhesive application, and fixture/clamping time are NOT INCLUDED in standard panel replacement times. OEM procedures must be followed for adhesive type and application.
keyPoints: Adhesive removal from mating surfaces NOT INCLUDED
Surface preparation for adhesive NOT INCLUDED
Adhesive application time NOT INCLUDED
Fixture/clamping during cure NOT INCLUDED
Adhesive material costs NOT INCLUDED
OEM-specified adhesive products required

inquiries.title: Wheel Alignment After Suspension or Structural Work
inquiries.response: Wheel alignment is NOT INCLUDED in suspension component R&I or replacement times. A four-wheel alignment should be performed after any repair involving suspension, steering, subframe, or structural components that could affect alignment.
keyPoints: Wheel alignment NOT INCLUDED in suspension R&R time
Four-wheel alignment recommended after structural repairs
Alignment equipment setup NOT INCLUDED
Pre-alignment inspection NOT INCLUDED
Alignment printout/documentation NOT INCLUDED

inquiries.title: R&I Overlap and Included Operations
inquiries.response: When multiple operations are performed on the same panel or assembly, some R&I operations may overlap (be included in another operation's time). Always check vehicle-specific footnotes and labor reports for overlap deductions. The estimating system may or may not automatically apply overlap.
keyPoints: R&I overlap deductions vary by vehicle and operation
Check footnotes for included/excluded R&I operations
CCC may auto-apply overlap; Mitchell may not
Overhaul (O/H) typically includes some R&I operations
Panel replacement may include adjacent trim R&I—verify per vehicle

inquiries.title: Backtape and Jamb Refinish
inquiries.response: Backtaping jambs (masking and refinishing the inner edges/jambs of doors, fenders, and other panels) is NOT INCLUDED in standard exterior refinish times. Backtape requires additional masking, basecoat, and clearcoat application to the return edges.
keyPoints: Backtape jamb refinish NOT INCLUDED in exterior refinish time
Additional masking for backtape NOT INCLUDED
Basecoat and clearcoat on jambs NOT INCLUDED
Commonly needed on doors, fenders, hoods, trunklids

inquiries.title: Undercoating and Stone Guard Replacement
inquiries.response: Application of undercoating, stone guard, chip guard, or rubberized coating to replacement panels is NOT INCLUDED. Factory undercoating on OEM panels must be replicated on replacement panels per OEM procedures.
keyPoints: Undercoating application NOT INCLUDED in panel replacement
Stone guard / chip guard NOT INCLUDED
Material costs NOT INCLUDED
Must replicate factory undercoating pattern
Preparation and masking before application NOT INCLUDED

inquiries.title: Clean Vehicle for Delivery
inquiries.response: Cleaning the vehicle for delivery after repairs is NOT INCLUDED in any repair labor times. This includes washing, interior cleaning, removing masking residue, compound residue cleanup, and detail cleaning.
keyPoints: Vehicle wash NOT INCLUDED
Interior cleaning NOT INCLUDED
Masking residue removal NOT INCLUDED
Compound/polish residue cleanup NOT INCLUDED
On-the-spot evaluation for time based on extent of repair
